name: Five Iron Golf
about: Five Iron Golf NYC Upper East Side is an indoor virtual golf venue combining a simulator bar experience with high-tech golf practice and social amenities. The facility features 10 Trackman-equipped simulator bays, allowing players to play on 200+ virtual courses including PGA Tour venues like Pebble Beach, offering a range of options from serious practice sessions to minigames and social play. The venue operates with a no-dress-code policy and is described as a casual lounge atmosphere designed to make golf accessible and entertaining for all skill levels. Membership provides benefits including 90 minutes of free golf daily, discounts on food and beverages, and access to instruction and leagues.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman technology for accurate shot tracking and course simulation
Full-service bar and chef-curated menu available for in-bay dining
No-dress-code atmosphere making golf accessible and less intimidating
Flexible booking options including walk-ins and advance reservations
Membership perks offering free play time and significant discounts on services

food_and_drink.notes: Chef-curated menu with options like pizzas and wings available for in-bay dining.
Full-service bar with drink packages and specials available.

simulator_hardware.notes: Fitted in all 10 bays with high-speed cameras for shot tracking.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but they also offer club rentals and fittings on-site.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue offers a full-service bar and a chef-curated menu.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes can vary, but with Trackman technology, it is typically faster than a traditional round.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Five Iron Golf offers junior clinics and is available for kids' parties, making it suitable for families.
